summary: Frontend testing completed for two bug fixes: (1) Dashboard shows stats on initial login - VERIFIED, (2) Preprocessing nudge visible immediately after loading dataset - VERIFIED. Both regression tests passed: Proceed to Training button works, Training still works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: DashboardView.js lines 32-57 compute lbStats from leaderboard entries when no in-session models exist

BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: DashboardView.js lines 60-165 show historical dashboard with stat cards (Total Models, Avg Score, Best Algorithm, Highest Score, Last Training), charts (Model Performance, Algorithm Usage), and Saved Analyses section
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: AnalysisView.js lines 215-245 contain preprocessing nudge positioned after Data Scanner card - visible immediately after loading dataset, BEFORE selecting target column
Preprocessing nudge shows status in green ('Preprocessing active: Missing Values will be applied during training.') with Edit button that navigates to Preprocess tab
REGRESSION VERIFIED: Proceed to Training button (data-testid='proceed-to-training-btn') exists on Preprocess tab and is functional
REGRESSION VERIFIED: Training a model still works correctly - model count increased from 207 to 219 after training
seed_data_creation: None - used existing saved analyses and leaderboard data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working. Dashboard now shows leaderboard-derived stats (Total Models: 219, Avg Score: 46.1%, Best Algorithm: Ridge Regression, Highest Score: 97.8%, Last Training: 7/6/2026), charts, and Saved Analyses section on initial login. Preprocessing nudge is visible immediately after loading a dataset on Analysis tab - shows 'Preprocessing active: Missing Values will be applied during training.' in green with Edit button. User has 14 saved analysis sessions and 219 models in leaderboard.

BUG_FIX_1_DASHBOARD_STATS_ON_LOGIN.description: Dashboard shows leaderboard-derived stats, charts, and saved analyses on initial login when no in-session models exist
BUG_FIX_1_DASHBOARD_STATS_ON_LOGIN.verified_behavior: Shows 'Welcome back! You have 219 trained models from previous sessions.' with stat cards (Total Models: 219, Avg Score: 46.1%, Best Algorithm: Ridge Regression, Highest Score: 97.8%, Last Training: 7/6/2026), Model Performance chart, Algorithm Usage chart, Saved Analyses section (14 sessions), and All-Time Leaderboard widget

BUG_FIX_2_PREPROCESSING_NUDGE_VISIBLE.description: Preprocessing nudge visible immediately after loading dataset, BEFORE selecting target column
BUG_FIX_2_PREPROCESSING_NUDGE_VISIBLE.verified_behavior: After loading Insurance Costs sample dataset, preprocessing nudge shows 'Preprocessing active: Missing Values will be applied during training.' in green with Edit button. Clicking Edit navigates to Preprocess tab.

REGRESSION_PROCEED_TO_TRAINING_BUTTON.description: Proceed to Training button exists on Preprocess tab
REGRESSION_PROCEED_TO_TRAINING_BUTTON.verified_behavior: Button found and functional, shows 'Ready to Train' message with '1 preprocessing step(s) will be applied during training: Missing Values'

REGRESSION_TRAINING_WORKS.description: Training a model still works correctly
REGRESSION_TRAINING_WORKS.verified_behavior: Training completed successfully, model count increased from 207 to 219
